raw_consumer_statement:
Mishandling of {$5000.00} Dispute Citi Failed to Notify or Act Within Required Timeframes ( Follow-up to Case # XXXX ) XXXX filing a follow-up complaint regarding a dispute with Citi on a {$5000.00} charge XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/year> ). 

Citi claimed my documents were illegible but failed to notify me before the submission deadline ( XX/XX/year> ), despite receiving XXXX submissions ( XX/XX/XXXX & XX/XX/XXXX ). No secure upload portal or re-submission path was provided. 

Citi also acknowledged initiating a chargeback, but admitted it was too late to process due to missed XXXX deadlines a failure on their part, not mine. 

This appears to be a violation of my rights under Regulation Z ( Truth in Lending Act ), and I believe Citi is avoiding accountability for procedural mismanagement. 

I am requesting that the CFPB reopen this matter, investigate Citis delay and failure to notify, and hold them accountable for their obligations under federal law.

Please : Provide timestamps of all communication attempts Specify why the documents were illegible Explain why they didnt notify you that they were illegible until after the deadline passed
